mapper.sql: id, notice_id, user_id, is_received, is_completed, is_acknowledged, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: insert into t_notice_read (notice_id, user_id, is_received, is_completed, is_acknowledged, create_time, update_time) values (#{noticeId}, #{userId}, #{isReceived}, #{isCompleted}, #{isAcknowledged}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})

insert into t_notice_read
notice_id, user_id, is_received, is_completed, is_acknowledged, create_time, update_time,
#{noticeId}, #{userId}, #{isReceived}, #{isCompleted}, #{isAcknowledged}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime},
mapper.select:
select count(n.id) from t_notice n left join t_notice_read nr on n.id = nr.notice_id and nr.user_id = #{userId} where
(nr.id is null or (nr.is_received = 0 and nr.is_completed = 0))
(nr.id is null or nr.is_acknowledged = 0)
1 = 0
mapper.insert: insert into t_notice_read (notice_id, user_id, is_received, is_completed, is_acknowledged, create_time, update_time) values (#{noticeId}, #{userId}, 1, 0, 0, now(), now()) on duplicate key update is_received = 1, update_time = now()

insert into t_notice_read (notice_id, user_id, is_received, is_completed, is_acknowledged, create_time, update_time) values (#{noticeId}, #{userId}, 0, 1, 0, now(), now()) on duplicate key update is_completed = 1, update_time = now()

insert into t_notice_read (notice_id, user_id, is_received, is_completed, is_acknowledged, create_time, update_time) values (#{noticeId}, #{userId}, 0, 0, 1, now(), now()) on duplicate key update is_acknowledged = 1, update_time = now()
